chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2494 of 2014 CP D 3214 of 2014 CP D 2493 of 2014 CP D 5901 of 2014 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 24.01.2023. None present on behalf of the petitioners Mr. Imdad Ali Bhatti advocate holds brief for Mr. Abdullah Munshi, advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Sohail H.K. Rana, advocate for respondent/CBC Qazi Ayazuddin Qureshi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. G.M. Bhutto, Assistant Attorney General ******** None present on behalf of the petitioners whereas, on 10.01.2023 the following order was passed:- “None present on behalf of the petitioners, nor any intimation is received, whereas, learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondent No.1 submits that these petitions have become infructuous pursuant to some orders passed by the hon’ble Supreme Court. Since nobody is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners, adjourned to 24.01.2023 with a note of caution if no one appears on behalf of the petitioners on the next date, appropriate orders may be passed. Office is directed to place copy of this order in the connected matters as mentioned above” Today, nobody has turned up. In view of such position, these petitions are dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected matters. J U D G E J U D G E Amjad/PA
